title: Highland Cow
description: A remodel of Minecraft's cow mob.
body:
![Cow in-game.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d2df8ca1aa3537a059ec4fbfa1a1c7d83c25b5a.png)
![Mooshroom in-game.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9340db9a4af2ae1d11a0f9d4b18734c6bd2cfa06.png)

Moofluff.
-------------------------------
![Pack in menu.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6412957b4731dd78f22eca83e35f339a609536a8.png)

This resourcepack replaces Minecraft's cow and red mooshroom model and textures with my own, inspired by the [Highland cow](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Highland_cattle). This was a project to experiment and learn more about [Blockbench](https://www.blockbench.net/), as well as create custom model resourcepacks.
Currently the brown mooshroom does not work, althought the texture is present in the files if you manage it to work. Brown mooshrooms will show up as red.

[OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) OR [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) required.
